```html
// ============================================================
//  UTILS
// ============================================================
function fmtETH(wei) {
  if (!wei) return "0.0000";
  return (parseFloat(ethers.utils.formatEther(wei))).toFixed(4);
}
function fmtBDT(wei) {
  if (!wei) return "0";
  const eth = parseFloat(ethers.utils.formatEther(wei));
  return Math.round(eth * CONFIG.ETH_TO_BDT).toLocaleString("en-BD");
}
function shortAddr(addr) {
  if (!addr) return "—";
  return addr.slice(0, 6) + "..." + addr.slice(-4);
}
function shortHash(hash) {
  if (!hash) return "—";
  return hash.slice(0, 12) + "...";
}

// ============================================================
//  HOOKS
// ============================================================
function useContract() {
  const [provider, setProvider] = useState(null);
  const [signer, setSigner] = useState(null);
  const [contract, setContract] = useState(null);
  const [account, setAccount] = useState(null);
  const [isConnected, setIsConnected] = useState(false);

  const connect = async () => {
    if (!window.ethereum) throw new Error("MetaMask not found! Please install MetaMask.");
    const web3Provider = new ethers.providers.Web3Provider(window.ethereum);
    await web3Provider.send("eth_requestAccounts", []);

    try {
      await window.ethereum.request({
        method: "wallet_switchEthereumChain",
        params: [{ chainId: "0x539" }],
      });
    } catch (switchError) {
      // ignore if already on correct chain
    }

    const web3Signer = web3Provider.getSigner();
    const addr = await web3Signer.getAddress();
    const ct = new ethers.Contract(CONFIG.CONTRACT_ADDRESS, ABI, web3Signer);

    setProvider(web3Provider);
    setSigner(web3Signer);
    setContract(ct);
    setAccount(addr);
    setIsConnected(true);
    return { provider: web3Provider, signer: web3Signer, contract: ct, account: addr };
  };

  return { provider, signer, contract, account, isConnected, connect };
}

// ============================================================
//  TOAST
// ============================================================
function Toast({ msg, type, onClose }) {
  useEffect(() => {
    const t = setTimeout(onClose, 4000);
    return () => clearTimeout(t);
  }, []);
  const icon = type === "success" ? "✓" : type === "error" ? "✕" : "ℹ";
  return (
    <div className={`toast toast-${type}`}>
      <span>{icon}</span> {msg}
    </div>
  );
}

// ============================================================
//  NAVBAR (with Language Toggle)
// ============================================================
function Navbar({ page, account, onBack }) {
  const { lang, setLang, t } = useLang();
  return (
    <div className="navbar">
      <div className="navbar-brand">
        ⛓ Block<span>-Relief</span>
      </div>
      <div className="flex gap-12" style={{alignItems:'center'}}>
        <button className="btn-lang" onClick={() => setLang(lang === 'bn' ? 'en' : 'bn')}>
          🌐 {t.langLabel}
        </button>
        {account && (
          <div className="badge badge-green" style={{fontSize:'12px'}}>
            {shortAddr(account)}
          </div>
        )}
        {page !== 'landing' && (
          <button className="btn btn-outline btn-sm" onClick={onBack}>{t.backToHome}</button>
        )}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

// ============================================================
//  LANDING PAGE
// ============================================================
function LandingPage({ onNavigate }) {
    const { t } = useLang();

  const portals = [
    {
      id: 'admin',
      icon: '🔐',
      title: t.portalAdmin,
      desc: t.portalAdminDesc,
      color: '#93c5fd',
    },
    {
      id: 'donor',
      icon: '💎',
      title: t.portalDonor,
      desc: t.portalDonorDesc,
      color: '#5eead4',
    },
    {
      id: 'victim',
      icon: '🆘',
      title: t.portalVictim,
      desc: t.portalVictimDesc,
      color: '#fde68a',
    },
  ];

  return (
    <div className="landing">
      <div className="hero fade-in">
        <div style={{
          fontFamily: 'var(--mono)', fontSize: '12px', color: 'var(--accent2)',
          letterSpacing: '0.12em', marginBottom: '18px',
          padding: '6px 14px', border: '1px solid var(--border2)', borderRadius: '20px',
          display: 'inline-block', background:'rgba(255,255,255,0.03)'
        }}>
          {t.heroTagline}
        </div>

        <h1 className="hero-title">
          {t.heroTitle1}<span>{t.heroHighlight}</span>{t.heroTitle2}
        </h1>

        <p className="hero-sub">{t.heroSub}</p>

        <div className="hero-note">{t.heroNote}</div>

        <div className="hero-mini-stats">
          <div className="hero-mini-stat">
            <div className="num">{t.miniStat1Title}</div>
            <div className="lbl">{t.miniStat1Desc}</div>
          </div>
          <div className="hero-mini-stat">
            <div className="num">{t.miniStat2Title}</div>
            <div className="lbl">{t.miniStat2Desc}</div>
          </div>
          <div className="hero-mini-stat">
            <div className="num">{t.miniStat3Title}</div>
            <div className="lbl">{t.miniStat3Desc}</div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div style={{display:'flex', gap:'12px', justifyContent:'center', marginBottom:26, flexWrap:'wrap'}}>
          <button className="btn btn-primary" onClick={() => onNavigate('donor')}>{t.donateNowBtn}</button>
          <button className="btn btn-outline" onClick={() => onNavigate('victim')}>{t.checkStatusBtn}</button>
        </div>

        <div className="portal-grid">
          {portals.map(p => (
            <div key={p.id} className="portal-card" onClick={() => onNavigate(p.id)}>
              <div className="portal-icon">{p.icon}</div>
              <div className="portal-title" style={{color: p.color}}>{p.title}</div>
              <div className="portal-desc">{p.desc}</div>
            </div>
          ))}
        </div>

        <div style={{maxWidth:920, margin:'36px auto 0', width:'100%'}}>
          <div className="grid-2" style={{gap:20}}>
            <div className="portal-card" style={{textAlign:'left'}}>
              <div className="section-title">{t.whereHelp}</div>
              <div className="section-sub" style={{marginTop:8}}>{t.whereHelpDesc}</div>
            </div>

            <div className="portal-card" style={{textAlign:'left'}}>
              <div className="section-title">{t.ourGoal}</div>
              <div className="section-sub" style={{marginTop:8}}>{t.ourGoalDesc}</div>
            </div>
          </div>

          <div className="grid-2 mt-16" style={{gap:20}}>
            <div className="portal-card" style={{textAlign:'left'}}>
              <div className="section-title">{t.whyImportant}</div>
              <ul style={{marginTop:10, paddingLeft:18, color:'var(--text2)', lineHeight:'1.9'}}>
                {t.whyList.map((item, i) => <li key={i}>{item}</li>)}
              </ul>
            </div>

            <div className="portal-card" style={{textAlign:'left'}}>
              <div className="section-title">{t.fieldReality}</div>
              <div className="section-sub" style={{marginTop:8}}>{t.fieldRealityDesc}</div>
            </div>
          </div>

          <div className="quote-strip">
            <div className="quote-item">
              {t.quote1}
              <small>{t.quote1sub}</small>
            </div>
            <div className="quote-item">
              {t.quote2}
              <small>{t.quote2sub}</small>
            </div>
            <div className="quote-item">
              {t.quote3}
              <small>{t.quote3sub}</small>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}
// ============================================================
//  ADMIN DASHBOARD
// ============================================================
function AdminDashboard({ showToast }) {
  const { t } = useLang();
  const { contract, account, isConnected, connect } = useContract();
  const [tab, setTab] = useState('overview');
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);
  const [stats, setStats] = useState(null);
  const [victims, setVictims] = useState([]);
  const [donors, setDonors] = useState([]);
  const [donorCount, setDonorCount] = useState(0);
  const [backendData, setBackendData] = useState(null);
  const [distributing, setDistributing] = useState(false);
  const [withdrawingReserve, setWithdrawingReserve] = useState(false);
  const [newTarget, setNewTarget] = useState('');

  const loadStats = useCallback(async () => {
    if (!contract) return;
    try {
      const [collected, target, pct] = await contract.getFundProgress();
      const balance = await contract.getContractBalance();
      const reserve = await contract.getReserveBalance();
      const vCount = await contract.victimCount();
      const dCount = await contract.getDonorCount();
      const isDist = await contract.isDistributed();
      const adminAddr = await contract.admin();

      setStats({ collected, target, pct: pct.toNumber(), balance, reserve, vCount: vCount.toNumber(), isDist, adminAddr });
      setDonorCount(dCount.toNumber());

      const vs = [];
      for (let i = 1; i <= Math.min(vCount.toNumber(), 20); i++) {
        try {
          const [vid, hash, score, relief, wallet, isPaid] = await contract.getVictim(i);
          vs.push({ vid: vid.toNumber(), hash, score: score.toNumber() / 100, relief, wallet, isPaid });
        } catch {}
      }
      setVictims(vs);

      const ds = [];
      for (let i = 0; i < Math.min(dCount.toNumber(), 10); i++) {
        try {
          const [addr, amt, ticket, donatedAt] = await contract.getDonor(i);
          ds.push({ addr, amt, ticket: ticket.toNumber(), donatedAt: donatedAt.toNumber() });
        } catch {}
      }
      setDonors(ds);
    } catch (e) {
      showToast(t.dataLoadError + e.message, "error");
    }
  }, [contract]);

  const loadBackendData = useCallback(async () => {
    try {
      const res = await fetch(`${CONFIG.PYTHON_API}/api/summary`);
      if (res.ok) setBackendData(await res.json());
    } catch {
      setBackendData({
        total_victims: 100,
        verified: 100,
        rejected: 10,
        total_submissions: 110,
        verification_rate: 90.9,
        total_allocated_bdt: 1000000,
        avg_score: 53.2,
        receipts: 0,
      });
    }
  }, []);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (isConnected) { loadStats(); loadBackendData(); }
  }, [isConnected]);

  const handleDistribute = async () => {
    if (!contract) return;
    setDistributing(true);
    try {
      const tx = await contract.autoDistribute();
      showToast(t.distTxSent, "info");
      await tx.wait();
      showToast(t.distSuccess, "success");
      loadStats();
    } catch (e) {
      showToast(e.reason || e.message, "error");
    }
    setDistributing(false);
  };

  const handleUpdateTarget = async () => {
    if (!contract || !newTarget) return;
    try {
      const wei = ethers.utils.parseEther(newTarget);
      const tx = await contract.updateTargetFund(wei);
      showToast(t.targetUpdating, "info");
      await tx.wait();
      showToast(t.targetUpdated, "success");
      setNewTarget('');
      loadStats();
    } catch (e) {
      showToast(e.reason || e.message, "error");
    }
  };

  const handleWithdrawReserve = async () => {
    if (!contract || !account) return;
    setWithdrawingReserve(true);
    try {
      const tx = await contract.withdrawReserve(account);
      showToast(t.reserveTxSent, "info");
      await tx.wait();
      showToast(t.reserveWithdrawn, "success");
      loadStats();
    } catch (e) {
      showToast(e.reason || e.message, "error");
    }
    setWithdrawingReserve(false);
  };

  const sidebarItems = [
    { id: 'overview',    icon: '📊', label: t.sideOverview },
    { id: 'victims',     icon: '👥', label: t.sideVictims },
    { id: 'donors',      icon: '💰', label: t.sideDonors },
    { id: 'distribute',  icon: '⚡', label: t.sideDistribute },
    { id: 'sensitivity', icon: '🎛️', label: t.sideSensitivity },
    { id: 'sms',         icon: '📱', label: t.sideSms },
    { id: 'analytics',   icon: '📈', label: t.sideAnalytics },
  ];

  if (!isConnected) {
    return (
      <div style={{display:'flex', alignItems:'center', justifyContent:'center', minHeight:'60vh'}}>
        <div className="card fade-in" style={{maxWidth:'400px', textAlign:'center', padding:'40px'}}>
          <div style={{fontSize:'48px', marginBottom:'16px'}}>🔐</div>
          <h2 style={{fontSize:'20px', marginBottom:'8px'}}>{t.adminPanel}</h2>
          <p className="text-muted text-sm" style={{marginBottom:'24px', lineHeight:'1.8'}}>
            {t.adminPanelDesc}
          </p>
          <button className="btn btn-primary" style={{width:'100%'}} onClick={async () => {
            try { await connect(); showToast(t.walletConnected, "success"); }
            catch(e) { showToast(e.message, "error"); }
          }}>
            {t.connectMM}
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>
    );
  }

  const isAdminWallet = stats && account && stats.adminAddr &&
    account.toLowerCase() === stats.adminAddr.toLowerCase();

  return (
    <div className="layout">
      <div className="sidebar">
        <div style={{padding:'0 16px 16px', marginBottom:'8px'}}>
          <div className="text-xs text-dim" style={{textTransform:'uppercase', letterSpacing:'0.1em'}}>{t.adminControl}</div>
        </div>
        {sidebarItems.map(item => (
          <div
            key={item.id}
            className={`sidebar-item ${tab === item.id ? 'active' : ''}`}
            onClick={() => setTab(item.id)}
          >
            <span className="sidebar-icon">{item.icon}</span>
            <span>{item.label}</span>
          </div>
        ))}
        <div className="divider" style={{margin:'16px 0'}}/>
        <div style={{padding:'0 16px'}}>
          <div className="text-xs text-dim mb-8">{t.walletLabel}</div>
          <div className="hash" style={{fontSize:'10px'}}>{account}</div>
          {isAdminWallet
            ? <div className="badge badge-green mt-8">{t.adminVerified}</div>
            : <div className="badge badge-red mt-8">{t.notAdmin}</div>
          }
        </div>
      </div>

      <div className="main-content fade-in">

        {/* ===== OVERVIEW TAB ===== */}
        {tab === 'overview' && (
          <div>
            <div className="section-header">
              <div className="section-title">{t.systemSummary}</div>
              <div className="section-sub">{t.systemSummaryDesc}</div>
            </div>

            {!isAdminWallet && (
              <div className="alert alert-warning mb-16">{t.notAdminWarn}</div>
            )}

            <div className="grid-4 mb-24">
              {[
                { label: t.contractBalance, value: fmtETH(stats?.balance) + ' ETH', sub: fmtBDT(stats?.balance) + ' BDT' },
                { label: t.totalDonated, value: fmtETH(stats?.collected) + ' ETH', sub: t.cumFund },
                { label: t.registeredRecipients, value: stats?.vCount ?? '—', sub: t.onBlockchain },
                { label: t.fundProgress, value: (stats?.pct ?? 0) + '%', sub: t.vsTarget },
              ].map(s => (
                <div key={s.label} className="stat-card">
                  <div className="stat-label">{s.label}</div>
                  <div className="stat-value text-accent">{s.value}</div>
                  <div className="stat-sub">{s.sub}</div>
                </div>
              ))}
            </div>

            <div className="grid-2">
              <div className="card">
                <div className="flex-between mb-16">
                  <div style={{fontWeight:600}}>{t.fundCollectionStatus}</div>
                  <div className="badge badge-blue">{stats?.pct ?? 0}%</div>
                </div>
                <div className="progress-bar">
                  <div className="progress-fill" style={{width: `${Math.min(stats?.pct ?? 0, 100)}%`}} />
                </div>
                <div className="flex-between mt-8">
                  <span className="text-xs text-dim">{fmtETH(stats?.collected)} {t.ethRaised}</span>
                  <span className="text-xs text-dim">{t.targetLabel}: {fmtETH(stats?.target)} ETH</span>
                </div>
              </div>

              <div className="card">
                <div style={{fontWeight:600, marginBottom:'16px'}}>{t.systemStatus}</div>
                {[
                  { label: t.distribution, val: stats?.isDist ? t.completed : t.pending, ok: stats?.isDist },
                  { label: t.verificationRate, val: (backendData?.verification_rate ?? 90.9) + '%', ok: true },
                  { label: t.fraudDetected, val: (backendData?.rejected ?? 10) + t.entries, ok: false },
                ].map(item => (
                  <div key={item.label} className="flex-between" style={{padding:'8px 0', borderBottom:'1px solid var(--border)'}}>
                    <span className="text-sm text-muted">{item.label}</span>
                    <span className={`text-sm ${item.ok ? 'text-green' : 'text-amber'}`}>{item.val}</span>
                  </div>
                ))}
              </div>
            </div>

            {backendData && (
              <div className="grid-4 mt-16">
                {[
                  { label: t.totalSubmissions, value: backendData.total_submissions },
                  { label: t.verifiedRecipients, value: backendData.verified },
                  { label: t.rejectedApps, value: backendData.rejected },
                  { label: t.avgRiskScore, value: backendData.avg_score?.toFixed(1) },
                ].map(s => (
                  <div key={s.label} className="stat-card">
                    <div className="stat-label">{s.label}</div>
                    <div className="stat-value" style={{fontSize:'22px'}}>{s.value}</div>
                  </div>
                ))}
              </div>
            )}
          </div>
        )}

        {/* ===== VICTIMS TAB ===== */}
        {tab === 'victims' && (
          <div>
            <div className="section-header">
              <div className="section-title">{t.recipientList}</div>
              <div className="section-sub">{t.recipientListDesc}</div>
            </div>
            <div className="card">
              <div className="table-wrap">
                <table>
                  <thead>
                    <tr>
                      <th>{t.idLabel}</th>
                      <th>{t.identityHash}</th>
                      <th>{t.ahpScore}</th>
                      <th>{t.reliefETH}</th>
                      <th>{t.reliefBDT}</th>
                      <th>{t.walletAddr}</th>
                      <th>{t.statusLabel}</th>
                    </tr>
                  </thead>
                  <tbody>
                    {victims.map(v => (
                      <tr key={v.vid}>
                        <td className="text-mono" style={{color:'var(--accent2)'}}>#{v.vid}</td>
                        <td><span className="hash">{v.hash.slice(0,14)}...</span></td>
                        <td className="text-mono">{v.score.toFixed(2)}</td>
                        <td className="text-mono">{fmtETH(v.relief)}</td>
                        <td className="text-mono text-teal">{fmtBDT(v.relief)}</td>
                        <td className="text-mono">{shortAddr(v.wallet)}</td>
                        <td>
                          {v.isPaid
                            ? <span className="badge badge-green">{t.paidLabel}</span>
                            : <span className="badge badge-amber">{t.pending}</span>
                          }
                        </td>
                      </tr>
                    ))}
                  </tbody>
                </table>
                {victims.length === 0 && (
                  <div style={{padding:'40px', textAlign:'center', color:'var(--text3)'}}>
                    {t.noRecipientsYet}
                  </div>
                )}
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        )}

        {/* ===== DONORS TAB ===== */}
        {tab === 'donors' && (
          <div>
            <div className="section-header">
              <div className="section-title">{t.donorList}</div>
              <div className="section-sub">{donorCount}{t.donorBlockchainSuffix}</div>
            </div>
            <div className="card">
              <div className="table-wrap">
                <table>
                  <thead>
                    <tr>
                      <th>{t.donorNo}</th>
                      <th>{t.walletAddress}</th>
                      <th>{t.amountETH}</th>
                      <th>{t.amountBDT}</th>
                      <th>{t.donatedAt}</th>
                    </tr>
                  </thead>
                  <tbody>
                    {donors.map((d, i) => (
                      <tr key={i}>
                        <td>
                          <span className="badge badge-blue">#{d.ticket}</span>
                        </td>
                        <td className="text-mono text-sm">{shortAddr(d.addr)}</td>
                        <td className="text-mono">{fmtETH(d.amt)}</td>
                        <td className="text-mono text-teal">{fmtBDT(d.amt)}</td>
                        <td className="text-sm text-muted">
                          {d.donatedAt ? new Date(d.donatedAt * 1000).toLocaleString() : '—'}
                        </td>
                      </tr>
                    ))}
                  </tbody>
                </table>
                {donors.length === 0 && (
                  <div style={{padding:'40px', textAlign:'center', color:'var(--text3)'}}>
                    {t.noDonorsYet}
                  </div>
                )}
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        )}

        {/* ===== DISTRIBUTE TAB ===== */}
        {tab === 'distribute' && (
          <div>
            <div className="section-header">
              <div className="section-title">{t.fundDistribution}</div>
              <div className="section-sub">{t.fundDistDesc}</div>
            </div>

            <div className="grid-2">
              <div className="card">
                <div style={{fontWeight:600, marginBottom:'16px'}}>{t.triggerDist}</div>
                <div className="alert alert-info mb-16">
                  <strong>{t.distLogic}</strong><br/>
                  {t.distLogicDesc}
                </div>
                {stats?.isDist ? (
                  <div className="alert alert-success">{t.distAlreadyDone}</div>
                ) : (
                  <>
                    {stats && parseInt(stats.pct) < 100 && (
                      <div className="alert alert-warning mb-16">
                        {t.targetNotReached} ({stats.pct}%){t.distMayFail}
                      </div>
                    )}
                    <button
                      className="btn btn-primary"
                      style={{width:'100%'}}
                      disabled={distributing || !isAdminWallet}
                      onClick={handleDistribute}
                    >
                      {distributing ? <><span className="spinner"/> {t.distributing}</> : t.startDistribution}
                    </button>
                  </>
                )}
              </div>

              <div className="card">
                <div style={{fontWeight:600, marginBottom:'16px'}}>{t.updateTarget}</div>
                <div className="alert alert-info mb-16" style={{fontSize:'12px'}}>
                  <strong>{t.howToSet}</strong><br/>
                  {t.howToSetDesc}
                </div>
                <div className="form-group">
                  <label className="form-label">{t.newTargetETH}</label>
                  <input
                    className="form-input"
                    type="number" step="0.01"
                    placeholder={t.newTargetPlaceholder}
                    value={newTarget}
                    onChange={e => setNewTarget(e.target.value)}
                  />
                </div>
                <button
                  className="btn btn-outline"
                  style={{width:'100%'}}
                  disabled={!newTarget || !isAdminWallet}
                  onClick={handleUpdateTarget}
                >
                  {t.saveNewTarget}
                </button>
                <div className="text-xs text-dim mt-8">
                  {t.currentTarget}: {fmtETH(stats?.target)} ETH
                </div>
              </div>

              <div className="card">
                <div style={{fontWeight:600, marginBottom:'16px'}}>{t.reservePool}</div>
                <div className="alert alert-info mb-16" style={{fontSize:'12px'}}>
                  {t.reserveDesc}
                </div>
                <div className="text-sm text-muted mb-12">
                  {t.currentReserve}: <strong>{fmtETH(stats?.reserve)} ETH</strong>
                </div>
                <button
                  className="btn btn-primary"
                  style={{width:'100%'}}
                  disabled={!isAdminWallet || withdrawingReserve || !stats?.reserve || stats.reserve.isZero?.()}
                  onClick={handleWithdrawReserve}
                >
                  {withdrawingReserve ? <><span className="spinner"/> {t.withdrawing}</> : t.withdrawReserve}
                </button>
                <div className="text-xs text-dim mt-8">
                  {t.withdrawNote}
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        )}

        {/* ===== SENSITIVITY TAB ===== */}
        {tab === 'sensitivity' && (
          <AdminSensitivity backendData={backendData} />
        )}

        {/* ===== SMS TAB ===== */}
        {tab === 'sms' && (
          <AdminSmsLog />
        )}

        {/* ===== ANALYTICS TAB ===== */}
        {tab === 'analytics' && (
          <AdminAnalytics backendData={backendData} stats={stats} />
        )}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

// ============================================================
//  ADMIN — Sensitivity Analysis
// ============================================================
function AdminSensitivity({ backendData }) {
  const { t } = useLang();
  const baseWeights = { [t.povertyIndex]:38.2, [t.waterDepth]:24.5, [t.shelterDist]:17.8, [t.houseType]:11.3, [t.floodDuration]:8.2 };
  const [weights, setWeights] = useState({...baseWeights});
  const [results, setResults] = useState(null);
  const totalWeight = Object.values(weights).reduce((a,b)=>a+b,0);

  const keys = Object.keys(baseWeights);

  const runAnalysis = () => {
    const victims = Array.from({length:10}, (_,i) => ({
      id: i+1,
      name: `${t.recipientLabel} #${i+1}`,
      normDepth: Math.random(),
      normHouse: Math.random(),
      normDuration: Math.random(),
      normPoverty: 0.4 + Math.random()*0.6,
      normDistance: Math.random(),
    }));
    const w = weights;
    const sum = totalWeight;
    const scored = victims.map(v => ({
      ...v,
      baseScore: (v.normDepth*baseWeights[keys[1]] + v.normHouse*baseWeights[keys[3]] +
        v.normDuration*baseWeights[keys[4]] + v.normPoverty*baseWeights[keys[0]] +
        v.normDistance*baseWeights[keys[2]]) / 100,
      newScore: (v.normDepth*w[keys[1]] + v.normHouse*w[keys[3]] +
        v.normDuration*w[keys[4]] + v.normPoverty*w[keys[0]] +
        v.normDistance*w[keys[2]]) / sum,
    }));
    setResults(scored);
  };

  const resetWeights = () => setWeights({...baseWeights});

  return (
    <div>
      <div className="section-header">
        <div className="section-title">{t.sensitivityTitle}</div>
        <div className="section-sub">{t.sensitivityDesc}</div>
      </div>
      <div className="alert alert-info mb-16">
        {t.sensitivityInfo}
      </div>
      <div className="grid-2">
        <div className="card">
          <div className="flex-between mb-16">
            <div style={{fontWeight:600}}>{t.adjustWeights}</div>
            <button className="btn btn-outline btn-sm" onClick={resetWeights}>{t.resetBtn}</button>
          </div>
          {Object.entries(weights).map(([key, val]) => (
            <div key={key} style={{marginBottom:'16px'}}>
              <div className="flex-between mb-8">
                <span className="text-sm">{key}</span>
                <span className="text-sm text-mono text-accent">{val.toFixed(1)}%</span>
              </div>
              <input type="range" min="1" max="60" step="0.5" value={val}
                onChange={e => setWeights(p => ({...p, [key]: parseFloat(e.target.value)}))}
                style={{width:'100%', accentColor:'var(--accent)'}} />
            </div>
          ))}
          <div className={`alert ${Math.abs(totalWeight-100) < 5 ? 'alert-success' : 'alert-warning'} mt-8`}>
            {t.totalLabel}: {totalWeight.toFixed(1)}% {Math.abs(totalWeight-100) < 5 ? t.approx100 : t.adjustTo100}
          </div>
          <button className="btn btn-primary mt-16" style={{width:'100%'}} onClick={runAnalysis}>
            {t.runAnalysis}
          </button>
        </div>
        <div className="card">
          <div style={{fontWeight:600, marginBottom:'16px'}}>{t.resultsLabel}</div>
          {!results ? (
            <div style={{padding:'40px', textAlign:'center', color:'var(--text3)'}}>
              {t.adjustAndRun}
            </div>
          ) : (
            <div className="table-wrap">
              <table>
                <thead><tr><th>{t.recipientLabel}</th><th>{t.prevScore}</th><th>{t.newScore}</th><th>{t.changeLabel}</th></tr></thead>
                <tbody>
                  {results.sort((a,b)=>b.newScore-a.newScore).map(v => {
                    const diff = ((v.newScore - v.baseScore) * 100).toFixed(1);
                    const isUp = diff > 0;
                    return (
                      <tr key={v.id}>
                        <td>{v.name}</td>
                        <td className="text-mono">{(v.baseScore*100).toFixed(1)}</td>
                        <td className="text-mono text-accent">{(v.newScore*100).toFixed(1)}</td>
                        <td className={isUp ? 'text-green' : 'text-red'}>
                          {isUp ? '↑' : '↓'} {Math.abs(diff)}
                        </td>
                      </tr>
                    );
                  })}
                </tbody>
              </table>
            </div>
          )}
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

// ============================================================
//  ADMIN — SMS Log Viewer
// ============================================================
function AdminSmsLog() {
  const { t } = useLang();
  const [logs, setLogs] = useState([]);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
  const [filter, setFilter] = useState('all');
  const [error, setError] = useState(null);

  const loadLogs = () => {
    setLoading(true);
    setError(null);

    fetch(`${CONFIG.PYTHON_API}/api/sms_log`)
      .then(r => {
        if (!r.ok) throw new Error(`HTTP ${r.status}`);
        return r.json();
      })
      .then(data => {
        if (Array.isArray(data) && data.length > 0) {
          setLogs(data);
        } else if (Array.isArray(data) && data.length === 0) {
          setLogs([]);
        } else {
          throw new Error('Invalid data format');
        }
      })
      .catch(err => {
        setError(err.message);
        setLogs([
          { Timestamp:'2026-05-27 10:00:01', Mobile:'8801301581457', Status:'SENT',
            Message:'Block-Relief\nপ্রিয় সুবিধাভোগী,\nআপনার ত্রাণ তহবিল নিশ্চিত হয়েছে।\nপরিমাণ: 5,000 BDT' },
          { Timestamp:'2026-05-27 10:00:02', Mobile:'8801712636928', Status:'SIMULATED',
            Message:'Block-Relief\nপ্রিয় সুবিধাভোগী,\nআপনার ত্রাণ তহবিল নিশ্চিত হয়েছে।\nপরিমাণ: 8,500 BDT' },
          { Timestamp:'2026-05-27 10:00:03', Mobile:'8801710966841', Status:'SIMULATED_WHITELIST',
            Message:'Block-Relief\nপ্রিয় সুবিধাভোগী...' },
        ]);
      })
      .finally(() => setLoading(false));
  };

  useEffect(() => { loadLogs(); }, []);

  const filtered = filter === 'all' ? logs : logs.filter(l => {
    if (filter === 'SIMULATED') return l.Status?.startsWith('SIMULATED');
    if (filter === 'FAILED') return l.Status === 'FAILED' || l.Status === 'ERROR';
    return l.Status === filter;
  });

  const statusColor = s => ({
    SENT:                'badge-green',
    SIMULATED:           'badge-blue',
    SIMULATED_WHITELIST: 'badge-amber',
    FAILED:              'badge-red',
    ERROR:               'badge-red',
    NO_NUMBER:           'badge-red',
  }[s] || 'badge-blue');

  const counts = {
    SENT:      logs.filter(l => l.Status === 'SENT').length,
    SIMULATED: logs.filter(l => l.Status?.startsWith('SIMULATED')).length,
    FAILED:    logs.filter(l => l.Status === 'FAILED' || l.Status === 'ERROR').length,
  };

  const filterButtons = [
    { id: 'all', label: t.allLabel },
    { id: 'SENT', label: t.sentLabel },
    { id: 'SIMULATED', label: t.simulated },
    { id: 'FAILED', label: t.failedLabel },
  ];

  return (
    <div>
      <div className="section-header">
        <div className="flex-between">
          <div>
            <div className="section-title">{t.smsLogTitle}</div>
            <div className="section-sub">{t.smsLogDesc}</div>
          </div>
          <button className="btn btn-outline btn-sm" onClick={loadLogs}>
            {t.refreshLoad}
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>

      {error && (
        <div className="alert alert-warning mb-16" style={{fontSize:'12px'}}>
          {t.apiError}
        </div>
      )}

      <div className="grid-3 mb-16">
        {[
          { label: t.realSmsSent,  val: counts.SENT,      color: 'var(--green)'   },
          { label: t.simulated,    val: counts.SIMULATED, color: 'var(--accent2)' },
          { label: t.failedError,  val: counts.FAILED,    color: 'var(--red)'     },
        ].map(s => (
          <div key={s.label} className="stat-card" style={{textAlign:'center'}}>
            <div className="stat-label">{s.label}</div>
            <div className="stat-value" style={{color: s.color, fontSize:'24px'}}>{s.val}</div>
          </div>
        ))}
      </div>

      <div className="card">
        <div className="flex gap-8 mb-16" style={{flexWrap:'wrap', alignItems:'center'}}>
          <span className="text-xs text-dim">{t.filterLabel}:</span>
          {filterButtons.map(f => (
            <button key={f.id}
              className={`btn btn-sm ${filter === f.id ? 'btn-primary' : 'btn-outline'}`}
              onClick={() => setFilter(f.id)}>
              {f.label} {f.id === 'all' ? `(${logs.length})` : ''}
            </button>
          ))}
          <span className="text-xs text-dim" style={{marginLeft:'auto'}}>
            {t.showingLast50}
          </span>
        </div>

        {loading ? (
          <div style={{padding:'32px', textAlign:'center'}}>
            <span className="spinner"/> {t.loadingSms}
          </div>
        ) : (
          <div className="table-wrap">
            <table>
              <thead>
                <tr>
                  <th>{t.timeLabel}</th>
                  <th>{t.mobileLabel}</th>
                  <th>{t.statusLabel}</th>
                  <th>{t.msgPreview}</th>
                </tr>
              </thead>
              <tbody>
                {filtered.slice(-50).reverse().map((l, i) => (
                  <tr key={i}>
                    <td className="text-mono text-xs">{l.Timestamp}</td>
                    <td className="text-mono text-sm">
                      +{String(l.Mobile || '').replace(/^\+/, '')}
                    </td>
                    <td>
                      <span className={`badge ${statusColor(l.Status)}`}>
                        {l.Status}
                      </span>
                    </td>
                    <td className="text-xs text-muted">
                      {String(l.Message || '')
                        .split('\n')
                        .filter(x => x.trim())
                        .slice(0, 2)
                        .join(' | ')
                        .slice(0, 65)}...
                    </td>
                  </tr>
                ))}
              </tbody>
            </table>
            {filtered.length === 0 && (
              <div style={{padding:'32px', textAlign:'center', color:'var(--text3)'}}>
                {filter === 'all' ? t.noSmsLog : t.noFilterEntry}
              </div>
            )}
          </div>
        )}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

// ============================================================
//  ADMIN ANALYTICS (Charts)
// ============================================================
function AdminAnalytics({ backendData, stats }) {
  const { t } = useLang();
  const chartRef = useRef(null);
  const chartRef2 = useRef(null);
  const chartInst = useRef(null);
  const chartInst2 = useRef(null);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (chartRef.current) {
      if (chartInst.current) chartInst.current.destroy();
      chartInst.current = new Chart(chartRef.current, {
        type: 'doughnut',
        data: {
          labels: [t.recipients100],
          datasets: [{
            data: [100],
            backgroundColor: ['#60a5fa'],
            borderWidth: 0,
          }]
        },
        options: {
          responsive: true, maintainAspectRatio: false,
          plugins: { legend: { display: false } }
        }
      });
    }
    if (chartRef2.current) {
      if (chartInst2.current) chartInst2.current.destroy();
      chartInst2.current = new Chart(chartRef2.current, {
        type: 'bar',
        data: {
          labels: [t.submittedLabel, t.verifiedLabel, t.rejectedLabel, t.registeredLabel],
          datasets: [{
            data: [
              backendData?.total_submissions ?? 110,
              backendData?.verified ?? 100,
              backendData?.rejected ?? 10,
              stats?.vCount ?? 0,
            ],
            backgroundColor: ['#475569', '#60a5fa', '#ef4444', '#2dd4bf'],
            borderRadius: 6, borderWidth: 0,
          }]
        },
        options: {
          responsive: true, maintainAspectRatio: false,
          plugins: { legend: { display: false } },
          scales: {
            x: { grid: { color: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.05)' }, ticks: { color: '#b6c7e0' } },
            y: { grid: { color: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.05)' }, ticks: { color: '#b6c7e0' } }
          }
        }
      });
    }
    return () => {
      if (chartInst.current) chartInst.current.destroy();
      if (chartInst2.current) chartInst2.current.destroy();
    };
  }, [backendData, stats]);

  return (
    <div>
      <div className="section-header">
        <div className="section-title">{t.analyticsTitle}</div>
        <div className="section-sub">{t.analyticsDesc}</div>
      </div>
      <div className="grid-2">
        <div className="card">
          <div style={{fontWeight:600, marginBottom:'12px'}}>{t.fundSplit}</div>
          <div style={{display:'flex', gap:'12px', marginBottom:'12px'}}>
            <span style={{display:'flex', alignItems:'center', gap:'6px', fontSize:'12px', color:'var(--text2)'}}>
              <span style={{width:'10px', height:'10px', borderRadius:'2px', background:'#60a5fa', display:'inline-block'}}></span> {t.recipients100}
            </span>
          </div>
          <div style={{position:'relative', height:'280px'}}>
            <canvas ref={chartRef} role="img" aria-label="Fund split chart">chart</canvas>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div className="card">
          <div style={{fontWeight:600, marginBottom:'12px'}}>{t.verificationPipeline}</div>
          <div style={{position:'relative', height:'300px'}}>
            <canvas ref={chartRef2} role="img" aria-label="Pipeline chart">chart</canvas>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div className="card mt-16">
        <div style={{fontWeight:600, marginBottom:'16px'}}>{t.fuzzyWeights}</div>
        <div style={{display:'flex', flexDirection:'column', gap:'12px'}}>
          {[
            { name: t.povertyIndex, weight: 38.2, color: '#60a5fa' },
            { name: t.waterDepth, weight: 24.5, color: '#2dd4bf' },
            { name: t.shelterDist, weight: 17.8, color: '#f59e0b' },
            { name: t.houseType, weight: 11.3, color: '#a78bfa' },
            { name: t.floodDuration, weight: 8.2, color: '#f87171' },
          ].map(c => (
            <div key={c.name}>
              <div className="flex-between mb-8">
                <span className="text-sm">{c.name}</span>
                <span className="text-sm text-mono" style={{color:c.color}}>{c.weight}%</span>
              </div>
              <div className="progress-bar">
                <div style={{height:'100%', width:`${c.weight}%`, background:c.color, borderRadius:'999px', transition:'width 1s ease'}} />
              </div>
            </div>
          ))}
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}
// ============================================================
//  DONOR DASHBOARD
// ============================================================
function DonorDashboard({ showToast }) {
  const { t } = useLang();
  const { contract, account, isConnected, connect } = useContract();
  const [tab, setTab] = useState('donate');
  const [donateAmt, setDonateAmt] = useState('');
  const [donating, setDonating] = useState(false);
  const [stats, setStats] = useState(null);
  const [myTicket, setMyTicket] = useState(null);
  const [myDonation, setMyDonation] = useState(null);
  const [txHistory, setTxHistory] = useState([]);
  const [paidVictims, setPaidVictims] = useState([]);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (account) {
      try {
        const saved = localStorage.getItem(`br_tx_history_${account.toLowerCase()}`);
        setTxHistory(saved ? JSON.parse(saved) : []);
      } catch {
        setTxHistory([]);
      }
    } else {
      setTxHistory([]);
    }
  }, [account]);

  const loadStats = useCallback(async () => {
    if (!contract) return;
    try {
      const [collected, target, pct] = await contract.getFundProgress();
      const balance = await contract.getContractBalance();
      const reserve = await contract.getReserveBalance();
      const dCount = await contract.getDonorCount();
      const vCount = await contract.victimCount();
      const isDist = await contract.isDistributed();
      setStats({ collected, target, pct: pct.toNumber(), balance, reserve, dCount: dCount.toNumber(), vCount: vCount.toNumber(), isDist });

      try {
        const ticket = await contract.getMyTicket();
        setMyTicket(ticket.toNumber());
      } catch {}

      try {
        const dIndex = await contract.donorIndex(account);
        const idx = dIndex.toNumber();
        if (idx > 0) {
          const [addr, amt, tick, donAt] = await contract.getDonor(idx - 1);
          setMyDonation({ addr, amt, tick: tick.toNumber(), donAt: donAt.toNumber() });
        } else {
          const dCount2 = await contract.getDonorCount();
          for (let i = 0; i < dCount2.toNumber(); i++) {
            const [addr, amt, tick, donAt] = await contract.getDonor(i);
            if (addr.toLowerCase() === account.toLowerCase()) {
              setMyDonation({ addr, amt, tick: tick.toNumber(), donAt: donAt.toNumber() });
              break;
            }
          }
        }
      } catch {}

      if (isDist) {
        try {
          const vCount2 = await contract.victimCount();
          const pvs = [];
          for (let i = 1; i <= vCount2.toNumber(); i++) {
            try {
              const [vid, hash, score, relief, wallet, isPaid] = await contract.getVictim(i);
              if (isPaid) {
                pvs.push({
                  vid: vid.toNumber(),
                  score: score.toNumber() / 100,
                  relief,
                  wallet,
                });
              }
            } catch {}
          }
          setPaidVictims(pvs);
        } catch {}
      }

    } catch(e) {
      console.error(e);
    }
  }, [contract, account]);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (isConnected) loadStats();
  }, [isConnected]);

  const handleDonate = async () => {
    if (!contract || !donateAmt) return;
    setDonating(true);
    try {
      const wei = ethers.utils.parseEther(donateAmt);
      const tx = await contract.donate({ value: wei });
      showToast(t.donationTxSent, "info");
      const receipt = await tx.wait();
      showToast(`✓ ${donateAmt}${t.donatedSuccessSuffix}`, "success");
      const newEntry = {
        hash: receipt.transactionHash,
        amount: donateAmt,
        time: new Date().toLocaleString(),
        block: receipt.blockNumber
      };
      setTxHistory(prev => {
        const updated = [newEntry, ...prev];
        try { localStorage.setItem(`br_tx_history_${account.toLowerCase()}`, JSON.stringify(updated)); } catch {}
        return updated;
      });
      setDonateAmt('');
      loadStats();
    } catch(e) {
      showToast(e.reason || e.message, "error");
    }
    setDonating(false);
  };

  const sidebarItems = [
    { id: 'donate', icon: '💎', label: t.sideDonate },
    { id: 'track',  icon: '📡', label: t.sideTrack },
    { id: 'impact', icon: '🌊', label: t.sideImpact },
  ];

  if (!isConnected) {
    return (
      <div style={{display:'flex', alignItems:'center', justifyContent:'center', minHeight:'60vh'}}>
        <div className="card fade-in" style={{maxWidth:'390px', textAlign:'center', padding:'40px'}}>
          <div style={{fontSize:'48px', marginBottom:'16px'}}>💎</div>
          <h2 style={{fontSize:'20px', marginBottom:'8px'}}>{t.donorPortal}</h2>
          <p className="text-muted text-sm" style={{marginBottom:'24px', lineHeight:'1.8'}}>
            {t.donorPortalDesc}
          </p>
          <button className="btn btn-teal" style={{width:'100%'}} onClick={async () => {
            try { await connect(); showToast(t.walletConnected, "success"); }
            catch(e) { showToast(e.message, "error"); }
          }}>
            {t.connectWallet}
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>
    );
  }

  return (
    <div className="layout">
      <div className="sidebar">
        <div style={{padding:'0 16px 16px', marginBottom:'8px'}}>
          <div className="text-xs text-dim" style={{textTransform:'uppercase', letterSpacing:'0.1em'}}>{t.donorPanel}</div>
        </div>
        {sidebarItems.map(item => (
          <div key={item.id} className={`sidebar-item ${tab === item.id ? 'active' : ''}`}
            onClick={() => setTab(item.id)}>
            <span className="sidebar-icon">{item.icon}</span>
            <span>{item.label}</span>
          </div>
        ))}
        <div className="divider" style={{margin:'16px 0'}}/>
        <div style={{padding:'0 16px'}}>
          <div className="text-xs text-dim mb-8">{t.myWallet}</div>
          <div className="hash" style={{fontSize:'10px'}}>{account}</div>
          {myTicket > 0 && <div className="badge badge-blue mt-8">{t.donorId} #{myTicket}</div>}
        </div>
      </div>

      <div className="main-content fade-in">

        {/* ===== DONATE TAB ===== */}
        {tab === 'donate' && (
          <div>
            <div className="section-header">
              <div className="section-title">{t.makeDonation}</div>
              <div className="section-sub">{t.donationDesc}</div>
            </div>

            <div className="grid-2">
              <div className="card card-glow">
                <div style={{fontWeight:600, marginBottom:'16px', color:'var(--teal2)'}}>{t.donateETH}</div>

                {stats?.isDist ? (
                  <div className="alert alert-warning">{t.distCompletedNoDonation}</div>
                ) : (
                  <>
                    <div className="form-group">
                      <label className="form-label">{t.amountLabel}</label>
                      <input
                        className="form-input"
                        type="number" step="0.001" min="0.001"
                        placeholder={t.amountPlaceholder}
                        value={donateAmt}
                        onChange={e => setDonateAmt(e.target.value)}
                      />
                      {donateAmt && (
                        <div className="text-xs text-muted mt-8">
                          {t.approxBDT} {Math.round(parseFloat(donateAmt || 0) * CONFIG.ETH_TO_BDT).toLocaleString()} BDT
                        </div>
                      )}
                    </div>
                    <div style={{display:'flex', gap:'8px', marginBottom:'16px', flexWrap:'wrap'}}>
                      {['0.01','0.05','0.1','0.5'].map(amt => (
                        <button key={amt} className="btn btn-outline btn-sm" onClick={() => setDonateAmt(amt)}>
                          {amt} ETH
                        </button>
                      ))}
                    </div>
                    <button
                      className="btn btn-teal" style={{width:'100%'}}
                      disabled={donating || !donateAmt}
                      onClick={handleDonate}
                    >
                      {donating ? <><span className="spinner"/> {t.donating}</> : t.donateNowAction}
                    </button>
                    {stats?.reserve && !stats.reserve.isZero?.() ? (
                      <div className="alert alert-info mt-16">
                        {t.targetReachedReserve}: {fmtETH(stats.reserve)} ETH
                      </div>
                    ) : (
                      <div className="alert alert-info mt-16">
                        {t.donationGoesToFund}
                      </div>
                    )}
                  </>
                )}
              </div>

              <div className="card">
                <div style={{fontWeight:600, marginBottom:'16px'}}>{t.fundCurrentStatus}</div>
                <div style={{marginBottom:'12px'}}>
                  <div className="progress-bar">
                    <div className="progress-fill" style={{width:`${Math.min(stats?.pct ?? 0, 100)}%`}} />
                  </div>
                  <div className="flex-between mt-8">
                    <span className="text-xs text-dim">{fmtETH(stats?.collected)} {t.ethRaised}</span>
                    <span className="text-xs text-dim">{stats?.pct ?? 0}%</span>
                  </div>
                </div>
                <div className="divider"/>
                {[
                  [t.totalRaised, fmtETH(stats?.collected) + ' ETH'],
                  [t.targetLabel, fmtETH(stats?.target) + ' ETH'],
                  [t.reserveFund, fmtETH(stats?.reserve) + ' ETH'],
                  [t.totalDonors, stats?.dCount ?? 0],
                  [t.registeredRecip, stats?.vCount ?? 0],
                  [t.statusLabel, stats?.isDist ? t.distCompleted : t.collecting],
                ].map(([k, v]) => (
                  <div key={k} className="flex-between" style={{padding:'7px 0', borderBottom:'1px solid var(--border)'}}>
                    <span className="text-sm text-muted">{k}</span>
                    <span className="text-sm text-mono">{v}</span>
                  </div>
                ))}
              </div>
            </div>

            {txHistory.length > 0 && (
              <div className="card mt-16">
                <div style={{fontWeight:600, marginBottom:'12px'}}>{t.myTransactions}</div>
                <div className="table-wrap">
                  <table>
                    <thead><tr><th>{t.txHash}</th><th>{t.amountCol}</th><th>{t.blockCol}</th><th>{t.timeLabel}</th></tr></thead>
                    <tbody>
                      {txHistory.map((tx, i) => (
                        <tr key={i}>
                          <td><span className="hash">{shortHash(tx.hash)}</span></td>
                          <td className="text-mono text-teal">{tx.amount} ETH</td>
                          <td className="text-mono">#{tx.block}</td>
                          <td className="text-sm text-muted">{tx.time}</td>
                        </tr>
                      ))}
                    </tbody>
                  </table>
                </div>
              </div>
            )}
          </div>
        )}

        {/* ===== TRACK TAB ===== */}
        {tab === 'track' && (
          <div>
            <div className="section-header">
              <div className="section-title">{t.fundFlow}</div>
              <div className="section-sub">{t.fundFlowDesc}</div>
            </div>

            <div className="card mb-16">
              <div style={{fontWeight:600, marginBottom:'20px'}}>{t.fundFlowTitle}</div>
              <div style={{display:'flex', alignItems:'center', gap:'0', flexWrap:'wrap'}}>
                {[
                  { label: t.donationPool, val: fmtETH(stats?.collected) + ' ETH', color: '#60a5fa' },
                  { label: '→', val: '', color: 'transparent' },
                  { label: t.victimAllocation, val: fmtETH(stats?.collected) + ' ETH', color: '#2dd4bf' },
                ].map((step, i) => (
                  <div key={i} style={{
                    flex: step.label === '→' ? '0 0 auto' : 1,
                    textAlign: 'center', padding: '12px 8px',
                    background: step.color === 'transparent' ? 'none' : `${step.color}1c`,
                    borderRadius: '10px', margin: step.label === '→' ? '0 4px' : '0 4px',
                    color: step.color === 'transparent' ? 'var(--text3)' : step.color,
                    fontSize: step.label === '→' ? '20px' : '13px',
                  }}>
                    {step.label !== '→' && <div style={{fontWeight:600, marginBottom:'4px'}}>{step.label}</div>}
                    {step.label === '→' ? '→' : <div className="text-mono" style={{fontSize:'15px'}}>{step.val}</div>}
                  </div>
                ))}
              </div>
            </div>

            <div className="card">
              <div style={{fontWeight:600, marginBottom:'16px'}}>{t.contractVerify}</div>
              <div className="alert alert-info mb-16">
                {t.contractVerifyInfo}
              </div>
              {[
                { label: t.contractAddr, val: CONFIG.CONTRACT_ADDRESS },
                { label: t.networkLabel, val: 'Ganache Local (Chain ID: 1337)' },
                { label: t.distStatusLabel, val: stats?.isDist ? t.completed : t.pending },
              ].map(item => (
                <div key={item.label} style={{marginBottom:'12px'}}>
                  <div className="text-xs text-dim mb-8">{item.label}</div>
                  <div className="hash">{item.val}</div>
                </div>
              ))}
            </div>
          </div>
        )}

        {/* ===== IMPACT TAB ===== */}
        {tab === 'impact' && (
          <div>
            <div className="section-header">
              <div className="section-title">{t.myImpact}</div>
              <div className="section-sub">{t.myImpactDesc}</div>
            </div>

            {!myDonation ? (
              <div className="card" style={{textAlign:'center', padding:'48px'}}>
                <div style={{fontSize:'48px', marginBottom:'16px'}}>💎</div>
                <div style={{color:'var(--text3)', marginBottom:'12px'}}>{t.noDonationFound}</div>
                <div className="text-xs text-dim">{t.goToDonate}</div>
              </div>
            ) : (
              <div>
                <div className="grid-2 mb-16">
                  <div className="card">
                    <div style={{fontWeight:600, marginBottom:'16px', color:'var(--teal2)'}}>{t.myContribution}</div>
                    {[
                      [t.totalDonatedLabel, fmtETH(myDonation.amt) + ' ETH'],
                      [t.inBDT, fmtBDT(myDonation.amt) + ' BDT'],
                      [t.donorIdLabel, '#' + myDonation.tick],
                      [t.donatedAtLabel, myDonation.donAt ? new Date(myDonation.donAt * 1000).toLocaleString() : '—'],
                    ].map(([k, v]) => (
                      <div key={k} className="flex-between" style={{padding:'9px 0', borderBottom:'1px solid var(--border)'}}>
                        <span className="text-sm text-muted">{k}</span>
                        <span className="text-sm text-mono text-teal">{v}</span>
                      </div>
                    ))}
                  </div>
                  <div className="card">
                    <div style={{fontWeight:600, marginBottom:'16px'}}>{t.mySharePool}</div>
                    {stats && myDonation && (
                      <>
                        <div className="stat-card mb-16">
                          <div className="stat-label">{t.contributionPct}</div>
                          <div className="stat-value text-accent">
                            {stats.collected && myDonation.amt
                              ? ((parseFloat(ethers.utils.formatEther(myDonation.amt)) /
                                 parseFloat(ethers.utils.formatEther(stats.collected))) * 100).toFixed(2) + '%'
                              : '0%'}
                          </div>
                        </div>
                        <div className="progress-bar mb-16">
                          <div className="progress-fill" style={{
                            width: stats.collected && myDonation.amt
                              ? Math.min(((parseFloat(ethers.utils.formatEther(myDonation.amt)) /
                                 parseFloat(ethers.utils.formatEther(stats.collected))) * 100), 100) + '%'
                              : '0%'
                          }} />
                        </div>
                        <div className="flex-between" style={{padding:'8px 0', borderBottom:'1px solid var(--border)'}}>
                          <span className="text-sm text-muted">{t.totalDonors}</span>
                          <span className="text-sm text-mono">{stats.dCount}</span>
                        </div>
                        <div className="flex-between" style={{padding:'8px 0', borderBottom:'1px solid var(--border)'}}>
                          <span className="text-sm text-muted">{t.helpedPeople}</span>
                          <span className="text-sm text-mono text-green">
                            ~{Math.ceil((stats?.vCount ?? 100) *
                              (myDonation.amt && stats.collected
                                ? parseFloat(ethers.utils.formatEther(myDonation.amt)) /
                                  parseFloat(ethers.utils.formatEther(stats.collected))
                                : 0))}{t.peopleSuffix}
                          </span>
                        </div>
                        <div className="flex-between" style={{padding:'8px 0'}}>
                          <span className="text-sm text-muted">{t.distStatusLabel}</span>
                          <span className={`text-sm ${stats.isDist ? 'text-green' : 'text-amber'}`}>
                            {stats.isDist ? t.completed : t.pending}
                          </span>
                        </div>
                      </>
                    )}
                  </div>
                </div>

                {paidVictims.length > 0 && (
                  <div className="card">
                    <div style={{fontWeight:600, marginBottom:'4px'}}>{t.paidList}</div>
                    <div className="text-xs text-dim mb-16">{t.paidListDesc}</div>
                    <div className="table-wrap">
                      <table>
                        <thead>
                          <tr>
                            <th>{t.recipientId}</th>
                            <th>{t.ahpScore}</th>
                            <th>{t.reliefETH}</th>
                            <th>{t.reliefBDT}</th>
                            <th>{t.walletAddr}</th>
                            <th>{t.statusLabel}</th>
                          </tr>
                        </thead>
                        <tbody>
                          {paidVictims.slice(0, 20).map(v => (
                            <tr key={v.vid}>
                              <td className="text-mono text-accent">#{v.vid}</td>
                              <td className="text-mono">{v.score.toFixed(2)}</td>
                              <td className="text-mono">{fmtETH(v.relief)}</td>
                              <td className="text-mono text-teal">{fmtBDT(v.relief)}</td>
                              <td className="text-mono text-sm">{shortAddr(v.wallet)}</td>
                              <td><span className="badge badge-green">{t.paidLabel}</span></td>
                            </tr>
                          ))}
                        </tbody>
                      </table>
                      {paidVictims.length > 20 && (
                        <div className="text-xs text-dim" style={{padding:'12px', textAlign:'center'}}>
                          {paidVictims.length}{t.showingOfSuffix}
                        </div>
                      )}
                    </div>
                  </div>
                )}

                {stats?.isDist && paidVictims.length === 0 && (
                  <div className="card" style={{textAlign:'center', padding:'32px', color:'var(--text3)'}}>
                    {t.loadingPaid}
                  </div>
                )}

                {!stats?.isDist && (
                  <div className="alert alert-info mt-0">
                    {t.distNotTriggered}
                  </div>
                )}
              </div>
            )}
          </div>
        )}

      </div>
    </div>
  );
}
// ============================================================
//  VICTIM PORTAL
// ============================================================
function VictimPortal({ showToast }) {
  const { t } = useLang();
  const [tab, setTab] = useState('status');
  const [nid, setNid] = useState('');
  const [phone, setPhone] = useState('');
  const [result, setResult] = useState(null);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);
  const [checked, setChecked] = useState(false);
  const [readContract, setReadContract] = useState(null);

  useEffect(() => {
    try {
      const provider = new ethers.providers.JsonRpcProvider(CONFIG.GANACHE_URL);
      const ct = new ethers.Contract(CONFIG.CONTRACT_ADDRESS, ABI, provider);
      setReadContract(ct);
    } catch {}
  }, []);

  const lookup = async () => {
    if (!nid.trim()) { showToast(t.enterNid, "error"); return; }
    setLoading(true);
    setChecked(false);
    let data = null;
    try {
      const res = await fetch(`${CONFIG.PYTHON_API}/api/victim?nid=${encodeURIComponent(nid.trim().toUpperCase())}`);
      if (res.ok) {
        data = await res.json();
      }
    } catch {}

    if (!data) data = mockData(nid.trim());

    if (data && data.found && readContract) {
      try {
        const isDist = await readContract.isDistributed();
        if (isDist) {
          data.stage = data.verification_status === 'Verified' ? 'Disbursed' : 'Rejected';
        } else {
          const statusMap = { 'Verified': 'Approved', 'Pending': 'Pending' };
          data.stage = statusMap[data.verification_status] || 'Pending';
          data.receipt_id = null;
          data.tx_hash = null;
        }
      } catch {}
    }

    setResult(data);
    setChecked(true);
    setLoading(false);
  };

  const mockData = (searchNid) => {
    if (!searchNid.toUpperCase().startsWith('NID')) return { found: false };
    const num = parseInt(searchNid.replace(/\D/g,'')) || 91;
    return {
      found: true,
      nid: searchNid.toUpperCase(),
      name: "Babul Khatun",
      upazila: "Zakiganj",
      mfs_account: `bKash-${String(num).padStart(5,'0')}`,
      verification_status: "Verified",
      vulnerability_score: 69.18,
      allocated_fund_bdt: 11572,
      traditional_equal_bdt: 10000,
      water_depth_ft: 10.0,
      duration_days: 9,
      distance_km: 11.0,
      house_type: "Kutcha (Type 1)",
      poverty_index: 0.76,
      stage: "Approved",
      receipt_id: null,
      tx_hash: null,
    };
  };

  const stageColor = (stage) => {
    const map = { Pending:'badge-amber', Verified:'badge-blue', Approved:'badge-blue', Disbursed:'badge-green', Rejected:'badge-red' };
    return map[stage] || 'badge-amber';
  };
  const stages = ['Pending', 'Verified', 'Approved', 'Disbursed'];
  const stageLabels = {
    Pending: t.stagePending,
    Verified: t.stageVerified,
    Approved: t.stageApproved,
    Disbursed: t.stageDisbursed,
    Rejected: t.stageRejected,
  };

  return (
    <div style={{maxWidth:'760px', margin:'0 auto', padding:'32px 24px'}}>
      <div className="fade-in">
        <div style={{textAlign:'center', marginBottom:'28px'}}>
          <div style={{fontSize:'44px', marginBottom:'10px'}}>🆘</div>
          <h1 style={{fontSize:'24px', fontWeight:'600', marginBottom:'8px'}}>{t.victimPortalTitle}</h1>
          <p className="text-muted text-sm">{t.victimPortalDesc}</p>
        </div>

        <div style={{display:'flex', gap:'8px', marginBottom:'24px', background:'rgba(255,255,255,0.03)', padding:'6px', borderRadius:'12px', border:'1px solid var(--border)'}}>
          {[
            { id:'status', label: t.checkStatusTab },
          ].map(tabItem => (
            <button key={tabItem.id} onClick={() => setTab(tabItem.id)} style={{
              flex:1, padding:'10px', border:'none', borderRadius:'8px', cursor:'pointer',
              background: tab===tabItem.id ? 'var(--accent)' : 'transparent',
              color: tab===tabItem.id ? '#fff' : 'var(--text2)',
              fontFamily:'var(--sans)', fontSize:'14px', fontWeight: tab===tabItem.id ? 600 : 400,
              transition:'all 0.2s',
            }}>
              {tabItem.label}
            </button>
          ))}
        </div>

        {tab === 'status' && (
          <div>
            <div className="card mb-16">
              <div className="form-group">
                <label className="form-label">{t.nidLabel}</label>
                <input className="form-input" placeholder={t.nidPlaceholder}
                  value={nid} onChange={e => setNid(e.target.value)}
                  onKeyDown={e => e.key==='Enter' && lookup()}
                  style={{fontSize:'16px', padding:'14px'}} />
              </div>
              <div className="form-group">
                <label className="form-label">{t.phoneLabel}</label>
                <input className="form-input" placeholder={t.phonePlaceholder}
                  value={phone} onChange={e => setPhone(e.target.value)} />
              </div>
              <button className="btn btn-teal" style={{width:'100%', padding:'14px', fontSize:'16px'}}
                disabled={loading} onClick={lookup}>
                {loading ? <><span className="spinner"/> {t.searching}</> : t.checkStatusAction}
              </button>
            </div>

            {checked && result && (
              <div className="fade-in">
                {!result.found ? (
                  <div className="card" style={{textAlign:'center', padding:'40px'}}>
                    <div style={{fontSize:'40px', marginBottom:'12px'}}>❌</div>
                    <div style={{fontWeight:600, marginBottom:'8px'}}>{t.notFound}</div>
                    <div className="text-muted text-sm" style={{lineHeight:'1.8'}}>
                      {t.notFoundDesc}
                    </div>
                  </div>
                ) : (
                  <div>
                    {/* ===== Application Stages ===== */}
                    <div className="card mb-16">
                      <div style={{fontWeight:600, marginBottom:'20px'}}>{t.appStages}</div>
                      <div style={{display:'flex', alignItems:'center'}}>
                        {stages.map((stage, i) => {
                          const currentIdx = stages.indexOf(result.stage);
                          const isDone = i <= currentIdx;
                          const isCurrent = i === currentIdx;
                          return (
                            <React.Fragment key={stage}>
                              <div style={{flex:1, textAlign:'center'}}>
                                <div style={{
                                  width:'38px', height:'38px', borderRadius:'50%', margin:'0 auto 8px',
                                  background: isDone ? 'var(--teal)' : 'rgba(255,255,255,0.06)',
                                  border:`2px solid ${isDone ? 'var(--teal)' : 'var(--border)'}`,
                                  display:'flex', alignItems:'center', justifyContent:'center',
                                  fontSize:'14px', fontWeight:'600', color: isDone ? '#fff' : 'var(--text3)',
                                  boxShadow: isCurrent ? '0 0 12px rgba(45,212,191,0.45)' : 'none',
                                }}>
                                  {isDone ? '✓' : i+1}
                                </div>
                                <div style={{fontSize:'11px', color: isDone ? 'var(--teal2)' : 'var(--text3)', fontWeight: isCurrent ? 600 : 400}}>
                                  {stageLabels[stage]}
                                </div>
                              </div>
                              {i < stages.length-1 && (
                                <div style={{flex:'0 0 16px', height:'2px', background: i<currentIdx ? 'var(--teal)' : 'var(--border)', marginBottom:'20px'}} />
                              )}
                            </React.Fragment>
                          );
                        })}
                      </div>
                    </div>

                    {/* ===== Applicant Info ===== */}
                    <div className="card mb-16">
                      <div className="flex-between mb-16">
                        <div style={{fontWeight:600}}>{t.applicantInfo}</div>
                        <span className={`badge ${stageColor(result.stage)}`}>{stageLabels[result.stage]}</span>
                      </div>
                      <div className="grid-2">
                        {[
                          [t.nameLabel, result.name],
                          ['NID', result.nid],
                          [t.upazilaLabel, result.upazila],
                          [t.mfsAccount, result.mfs_account],
                          [t.houseTypeLabel, result.house_type],
                          [t.povertyIdx, result.poverty_index],
                        ].map(([k,v]) => (
                          <div key={k} style={{padding:'8px 0', borderBottom:'1px solid var(--border)'}}>
                            <div className="text-xs text-dim">{k}</div>
                            <div className="text-sm mt-8" style={{fontWeight:500}}>{v}</div>
                          </div>
                        ))}
                      </div>
                    </div>

                    {/* ===== Flood Info ===== */}
                    <div className="card mb-16">
                      <div style={{fontWeight:600, marginBottom:'16px'}}>{t.floodInfo}</div>
                      <div className="grid-3">
                        {[
                          [t.waterDepthFt, result.water_depth_ft+' ft'],
                          [t.durationDays, result.duration_days + t.daysSuffix],
                          [t.distanceKm, result.distance_km+' km'],
                        ].map(([k,v]) => (
                          <div key={k} className="stat-card" style={{textAlign:'center'}}>
                            <div className="stat-label">{k}</div>
                            <div className="stat-value text-accent" style={{fontSize:'20px'}}>{v}</div>
                          </div>
                        ))}
                      </div>
                    </div>

                    {/* ===== Relief Allocation ===== */}
                    <div className="card mb-16">
                      <div style={{fontWeight:600, marginBottom:'16px'}}>{t.reliefAllocation}</div>
                      <div className="grid-2">
                        <div className="stat-card">
                          <div className="stat-label">{t.vulnScore}</div>
                          <div className="stat-value text-accent">{result.vulnerability_score}</div>
                          <div className="stat-sub">{t.vulnCalc}</div>
                        </div>
                        <div className="stat-card">
                          <div className="stat-label">{t.yourAllocation}</div>
                          <div className="stat-value text-teal">৳{result.allocated_fund_bdt?.toLocaleString()}</div>
                          <div className="stat-sub">{t.vsEqualShare}: ৳{result.traditional_equal_bdt?.toLocaleString()}</div>
                        </div>
                      </div>
                      <div className="alert alert-info mt-16" style={{fontSize:'12px'}}>
                        {t.vulnExplain}
                      </div>
                    </div>

                    {/* ===== Payment Receipt ===== */}
                    {result.receipt_id && (
                      <div className="card">
                        <div style={{fontWeight:600, marginBottom:'16px'}}>{t.paymentReceipt}</div>
                        {[[t.receiptId, result.receipt_id], [t.txHashLabel, result.tx_hash]].map(([k,v]) => (
                          <div key={k} style={{marginBottom:'12px'}}>
                            <div className="text-xs text-dim mb-8">{k}</div>
                            <div className="hash">{v}</div>
                          </div>
                        ))}
                        <div className="badge badge-green mt-8">{t.paymentConfirmed}</div>
                      </div>
                    )}
                  </div>
                )}
              </div>
            )}
          </div>
        )}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

// ============================================================
//  APP ROOT
// ============================================================
function App() {
  const [page, setPage] = useState('landing');
  const [toast, setToast] = useState(null);
  const [lang, setLang] = useState('bn');

  const t = TRANSLATIONS[lang];

  const showToast = (msg, type='info') => {
    setToast({ msg, type, id: Date.now() });
  };

  return (
    <LangContext.Provider value={{ lang, setLang, t }}>
      <div>
        <Navbar page={page} onBack={() => setPage('landing')} />

        {page === 'landing' && <LandingPage onNavigate={setPage} />}
        {page === 'admin'   && <AdminDashboard showToast={showToast} />}
        {page === 'donor'   && <DonorDashboard showToast={showToast} />}
        {page === 'victim'  && <VictimPortal showToast={showToast} />}

        {toast && (
          <Toast
            key={toast.id}
            msg={toast.msg}
            type={toast.type}
            onClose={() => setToast(null)}
          />
        )}
      </div>
    </LangContext.Provider>
  );
}

ReactDOM.createRoot(document.getElementById('root')).render(<App />);
</script>
</body>
</html>
```

---
